languages.text: "Ваша Светлость, вы немало работы у меня забрали". {n}Хирургеон устало улыбается, вытирая рукавом окровавленное лицо.{/n} "Тут одной из наших доставили новый аугмент, но он ей больше не пригодится. Так что уж не побрезгуйте, возьмите, вдруг кому из вашей свиты подойдет".
languages.translation_comment:
Если спасли всех
Хирург Лукха, выдаем Augment_Torso_05

Если спасли всех
Хирург Лукха, выдаем Augment_Torso_05

languages.text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, you've spared me a lot of work." {n}The chirurgeon gives a tired smile, wiping blood from his face with his sleeve.{/n} "A new augment arrived for one of our soldiers, but she has no more need for it. Please, do not hesitate to take it — it might suit someone in your retinue."
languages.original_text: "Ваша Светлость, вы немало работы у меня забрали". {n}Хирургеон устало улыбается, вытирая рукавом окровавленное лицо.{/n} "Тут одной из наших доставили новый аугмент, но он ей больше не пригодится. Так что уж не побрезгуйте, возьмите, вдруг кому из вашей свиты подойдет".

traits.locale_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, you've spared me a lot of work." {n}The chirurgeon gives a tired smile, wiping blood from his face with his sleeve.{/n} "A new augment arrived for one of our soldiers, but she has no more need for it. Please, do not disdain and take it — it might suit someone in your retinue."

Please, do not disdain and take it — it might suit someone in your retinue."

Please, do not hesitate to take it — it might suit someone in your retinue."

languages.text: “大人，您倒是帮我省了不少事。”{n}船医露出一个疲惫的微笑，用袖子擦着脸上的血。{/n}“有个新植入物本来是给我们的一个士兵准备的，可她已经用不上了。尽管拿走吧，说不定您身边的随从能用上。”
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, you've spared me a lot of work." {n}The chirurgeon gives a tired smile, wiping blood from his face with his sleeve.{/n} "A new augment arrived for one of our soldiers, but she has no more need for it. Please, do not hesitate to take it — it might suit someone in your retinue."

traits.locale_text: “大人，您倒是帮我省了不少事。”{n}船医露出一个疲惫的微笑，用袖子擦着脸上的血。{/n}“有个新植入物本来是给我们的一个士兵准备的，可她已经用不上了。尽管拿走吧，说不定您身边的随从能用上。”

languages.text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, beni epey bir işten kurtardınız." {n}Cerrah, yorgun bir gülümseme eşliğinde koluyla yüzündeki kanı siliyor.{/n} "Askerlerimizden birine yeni bir ogment gelmişti ama artık ona ihtiyacı kalmadı. İsterseniz siz alın. Maiyetinizdeki birine uyabilir."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, you've spared me a lot of work." {n}The chirurgeon gives a tired smile, wiping blood from his face with his sleeve.{/n} "A new augment arrived for one of our soldiers, but she has no more need for it. Please, do not hesitate to take it — it might suit someone in your retinue."

traits.locale_text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, beni epey bir işten kurtardınız." {n}Cerrah, yorgun bir gülümseme eşliğinde koluyla yüzündeki kanı siliyor.{/n} "Askerlerimizden birine yeni bir ogment gelmişti ama artık ona ihtiyacı kalmadı. İsterseniz siz alın. Maiyetinizdeki birine uyabilir."

languages.text: « Vous m'avez épargné beaucoup de travail, Votre Seigneurie. » {n}Le chirurgeon vous adresse un sourire fatigué en essuyant le sang sur son visage avec sa manche.{/n} « Nous avons reçu une nouvelle augmentation, mais le soldat auquel elle était destinée n'en aura plus besoin. N'hésitez pas à la prendre, elle pourrait convenir à un membre de votre entourage. »
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, you've spared me a lot of work." {n}The chirurgeon gives a tired smile, wiping blood from his face with his sleeve.{/n} "A new augment arrived for one of our soldiers, but she has no more need for it. Please, do not hesitate to take it — it might suit someone in your retinue."

traits.locale_text: « Vous m'avez épargné beaucoup de travail, Votre Seigneurie. » {n}Le chirurgeon vous adresse un sourire fatigué en essuyant le sang sur son visage avec sa manche.{/n} « Nous avons reçu une nouvelle augmentation, mais le soldat auquel elle était destinée n'en aura plus besoin. N'hésitez pas à la prendre, elle pourrait convenir à un membre de votre entourage. »

languages.text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, me ha ahorrado mucho trabajo». {n}El cirujano te ofrece una sonrisa cansada mientras se limpia la sangre de la cara con la manga.{/n} «Ha llegado un nuevo aumento para una de nuestros soldados, pero ya no lo necesita. No dude en llevárselo; puede que le resulte útil a algún miembro de su séquito».
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, you've spared me a lot of work." {n}The chirurgeon gives a tired smile, wiping blood from his face with his sleeve.{/n} "A new augment arrived for one of our soldiers, but she has no more need for it. Please, do not hesitate to take it — it might suit someone in your retinue."

traits.locale_text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, me ha ahorrado mucho trabajo». {n}El cirujano te ofrece una sonrisa cansada mientras se limpia la sangre de la cara con la manga.{/n} «Ha llegado un nuevo aumento para una de nuestros soldados, pero ya no lo necesita. No dude en llevárselo; puede que le resulte útil a algún miembro de su séquito».

languages.text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, Ihr habt mir viel Arbeit erspart." {n}Der Chirurgeum lächelt dich müde an und wischt sich mit dem Ärmel Blut von seinem Gesicht.{/n} "Für eine unserer Soldatinnen ist eine neue Augmentation eingetroffen, aber sie braucht sie nicht mehr. Bitte, greift zu ... vielleicht hat jemand in Eurem Gefolge Bedarf dafür."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, you've spared me a lot of work." {n}The chirurgeon gives a tired smile, wiping blood from his face with his sleeve.{/n} "A new augment arrived for one of our soldiers, but she has no more need for it. Please, do not hesitate to take it — it might suit someone in your retinue."

traits.locale_text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, Ihr habt mir viel Arbeit erspart." {n}Der Chirurgeum lächelt dich müde an und wischt sich mit dem Ärmel Blut von seinem Gesicht.{/n} "Für eine unserer Soldatinnen ist eine neue Augmentation eingetroffen, aber sie braucht sie nicht mehr. Bitte, greift zu ... vielleicht hat jemand in Eurem Gefolge Bedarf dafür."

languages.text: 「{mf|閣下|閣下}、おかげでずいぶんと手間が省けました。」{n}外科医は疲れた笑みを浮かべ、袖で顔の血を拭う。{/n}「我々の兵士の一人に新たなオーグメントが届いたのですが、彼女にはもう必要ありません。どうぞご遠慮なくお持ちください――あなたのお供の誰かに合うかもしれません。」
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, you've spared me a lot of work." {n}The chirurgeon gives a tired smile, wiping blood from his face with his sleeve.{/n} "A new augment arrived for one of our soldiers, but she has no more need for it. Please, do not hesitate to take it — it might suit someone in your retinue."

traits.locale_text: 「{mf|閣下|閣下}、おかげでずいぶんと手間が省けました。」{n}外科医は疲れた笑みを浮かべ、袖で顔の血を拭う。{/n}「我々の兵士の一人に新たなオーグメントが届いたのですが、彼女にはもう必要ありません。どうぞご遠慮なくお持ちください――あなたのお供の誰かに合うかもしれません。」
